title: Web Developer
description:
**Binated is hiring for Web Developers in Pune!** 




  





 For faster responses please submit your resume to hr@binated.com
 







 Job Type: Full\\-time, Permanent
 







 As a web developer you would be a core contributor to the development, optimization, and infrastructure of the Binated website. Collaborate closely with UI/UX Designers and Dev teams to ensure reliable, performant, accessible, and secure sites. Develop and maintain high\\-quality user interfaces, ensuring accessibility standards are met and conducting visual QA to deliver polished, user\\-friendly experiences. Participate in code reviews and provide feedback to other engineers on the team. Troubleshoot and debug issues as they arise and make recommendations for the latest web technologies and improvements.
 



  





 We'd love to hear from you if you have:    
 



   •  Development experience using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. 
 



     •    Experience in React/Typescript, frameworks (NextJS, Gatsby), and headless content management systems (Sanity, Contentful).
 



     •    Proficiency in building accessible, responsive, and visually appealing UIs, with a solid understanding of UI/UX principles, experience collaborating closely with designers, and a solid focus on QA and testing.
 



     •    Ability to work in a multi\\-functional team environment using Agile development methodologies.
 



     •    Experience working on SEO\\-driven projects, localization, performance optimization \\& experimentation.
 



   •  Are ready to Work from Office in Pune, 5 days working
 



  





 While not required, it’s an added plus if you also have:
 



  





     •    Solid understanding of conversion rate optimization standard methodologies, using A/B testing to achieve results.
 



     •    Familiarity with cloud infrastructure, CI/CD strategy and deployment processes.
 



     •    Demonstrable experience with backend technologies (NodeJS, Express), and database operation/management.
 



     •    Graduate preferred 
 



     •    Immediate joiners preferred
 



  





 Benefits:
 



     •    Leave encashment
 



     •    Provident Fund
 



  





 Supplemental Pay Types:
 



     •    Overtime pay
 



**•** 
 Shift allowance
 



**•** 
 Yearly bonus

title: Software Engineer III-Java Reactjs AWS
description:
**Job Description**
 We have an exciting and rewarding opportunity for you to take your software engineering career to the next level.
   

  

 As a Software Engineer III at JPMorganChase within the Employee Platform, you serve as a seasoned member of an agile team to design and deliver trusted market\\-leading technology products in a secure, stable, and scalable way. You are responsible for carrying out critical technology solutions across multiple technical areas within various business functions in support of the firm’s business objectives.
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
* Executes software solutions, design, development, and technical troubleshooting with ability to think beyond routine or conventional approaches to build solutions or break down technical problems
* Creates secure and high\\-quality production code and maintains algorithms that run synchronously with appropriate systems
* Produces architecture and design artifacts for complex applications while being accountable for ensuring design constraints are met by software code development
* Gathers, analyzes, synthesizes, and develops visualizations and reporting from large, diverse data sets in service of continuous improvement of software applications and systems
* Proactively identifies hidden problems and patterns in data and uses these insights to drive improvements to coding hygiene and system architecture
* Contributes to software engineering communities of practice and events that explore new and emerging technologies
* Adds to team culture of diversity, opportunity, inclusion, and respect


**Required Qualifications, Capabilities, And Skills**
* Formal training or certification on software engineering concepts and 3\\+ years applied experience.
* Hands\\-on practical experience in system design, application development, testing, and operational stability
* Proficient in coding in one or more languages
* Experience in developing, debugging, and maintaining code in a large corporate environment with one or more modern programming languages and database querying languages
* Overall knowledge of the Software Development Life Cycle
* Solid understanding of agile methodologies such as CI/CD, Application Resiliency, and Security
* Demonstrated knowledge of software applications and technical processes within a technical discipline (e.g., cloud, artificial intelligence, machine learning, mobile, etc.)
* Coding exposure with modern front\\-end technologies such as React, Typescript
* Coding exposure with modern back\\-end technologies and database such as Java, Oracle
* Exposure to cloud technologies such as AWS


**Preferred Qualifications, Capabilities, And Skills**
* Familiarity with modern back\\-end technologies and database such as Java, Python, Oracle
* Familiarity with modern front\\-end technologies such as React
* Exposure to cloud technologies such as AWS


**ABOUT US**

description:

 • Demonstrated proficiency in
 **Java programming with strong knowledge of core Java constructs including Collections, Exceptions, Streams, and Lambdas**

title: Software Engineer Microservices / PostgreSQL
description:
**Company Description** 




 CAM Tool Soft Services established in 2007 (India) and working with USA companies. We are service provider for PCB for Front End.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 This is a full\\-time, on\\-site Software Engineer role located in Ahmedabad, focused on developing microservices and working with PostgreSQL.
 



 We are looking for a Software Developer to help build modern backend applications using a microservices architecture.
 



 The role will work closely with a software architect who will handle system design, while the developer focuses on implementation.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



  





 \\* Develop backend services using microservices architecture
 



 \\* Build scalable REST APIs
 



 \\* Work with PostgreSQL databases including JSON / JSONB
 



 \\* Design schemas for both structured relational data and flexible JSON data
 



 \\* Build services that can operate independently or communicate with other services
 



 \\* Write clean, maintainable, and well\\-tested code
 



 \\* Collaborate on system architecture and design
 



  





 Required Skills
 



  





 \\* 2\\+ years backend development experience
 



 \\* Experience with microservices architecture
 



 \\* Strong knowledge of PostgreSQL
 



 \\* Experience with JSON / JSONB in PostgreSQL
 



 \\* Experience building REST APIs
 



 \\* Understanding of database design and performance optimization
 



 \\* Familiarity with Docker / cloud environments is a plus

 \\* Experience with Java / Spring Boot
 



 \\* Experience designing flexible schemas similar to NoSQL systems
 



 \\* Knowledge of distributed systems
 



 \\* Experience with CI/CD pipelines

 Tech Stack
 



  





 Database: PostgreSQL

 Data Handling: JSON / JSONB
 



 Backend: Language agnostic (Java preferred)
 



 API: REST APIs
 



  





 What We’re Looking For
 



 • Developer comfortable working in modern distributed architectures
 



 • Ability to translate architectural designs into clean, maintainable code
 



 • Ability to build systems handling complex product data structures (e.g., electronic components with
 



 varying attributes)

title: Principal Software Engineer
description:
**About the Role** 




 The Principal Software Engineer is responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining high\\-quality software products that align with business requirements and exceed customer expectations. As a key member of the development team, this role involves close collaboration with product management, QA teams, and other stakeholders to drive a robust development process supporting the company growth objectives. The ideal candidate will bring extensive expertise in full stack software development, strong problem\\-solving skills, and the ability to effectively communicate and collaborate across cross\\-functional teams.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Provide technical guidance and mentorship to Software Engineers, fostering a collaborative and growth\\-oriented environment.
* Design and develop complex front\\-end and back\\-end components of web applications, ensuring scalability, performance, and maintainability.
* Develop clean, efficient, and well\\-documented code, adhering to high standards for coding practices and quality.
* Collaborate with product management to define product roadmaps, prioritize features, and align development efforts with business goals.
* Develop responsive and intuitive user interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, KnockoutJS, Angular, and NgRx, adhering to UI/UX best practices and accessibility standards.
* Develop robust server\\-side solutions using C\\#, .NET 9, and other relevant technologies, ensuring scalability, performance, and maintainability.
* Implement and optimize background job processing using tools like Hangfire to enhance application efficiency and reliability.
* Design and implement RESTful APIs, ensuring seamless integration with front\\-end applications and alignment with industry best practices.
* Integrate third\\-party APIs and services to extend application functionality and enhance capabilities.
* Manage and optimize Elastic Search to deliver efficient and scalable search functionalities within applications.
* Utilize Git or similar version control systems for code management, ensuring collaboration and codebase integrity.
* Participate in code reviews, maintaining high standards of code quality, consistency, and security.
* Develop and execute comprehensive unit tests, integration tests, and end\\-to\\-end tests to validate application functionality and performance.
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues, providing support to team members as needed to ensure timely resolution.
* Conduct root cause analysis of defects and issues and clearly communicate findings to relevant stakeholders.
* Participate in agile ceremonies (e.g., sprint planning, daily stand\\-ups, retrospectives) to align testing efforts with team goals and objectives.
* Prioritize and manage multiple tasks effectively in a fast\\-paced environment.
* Work independently and take ownership of assigned tasks while being a strong team player.
* Demonstrate a solid understanding of the business domain and end\\-user requirements to ensure development efforts deliver value to customers.
* Collaborate effectively with team members to break down tasks, estimate efforts accurately, and deliver features incrementally to meet project milestones and deadlines.



  





**Qualifications** 



* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Master’s degree preferred.
* 12\\+ years of experience in full stack software development.



  





**Required Skills** 



* Proven expertise in C\\#, .NET Core or .NET 9, and other relevant technologies in web development.
* Strong understanding of front\\-end frameworks such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, KnockoutJS, Angular, and NgRx.
* Deep knowledge of Web API development principles and best practices.
* Experience in managing and optimizing databases, including SQL Server and Elastic Search.
* Proficiency in background job processing using tools like Hangfire.
* Extensive experience with Azure and AWS cloud platforms.
* Experience with Agile methodologies and tools, including Git for version control and JIRA for project management and issue tracking.
* Experience with microservices architecture.
* Experience working within a Continuous Integration/Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) process.
* Knowledge of software builds, testing, and CI/CD tools (e.g., Jenkins, Git).
* Ability to take initiative, offer suggestions, and provide resolutions proactively.
* Passion for delivering business value and willingness to perform other assigned tasks.
* Ability to provide regular updates, system solutions, and communicate issues to the management team.
* Constantly strive to learn new technologies and stay up to date in the rapidly changing industry.
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to effectively collaborate with cross\\-functional teams.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail.



  





**Preferred Skills** 



* Experience with microservices architecture.
* Experience working within a Continuous Integration/Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) process.



  





**Pay range and compensation package** 




 20\\-26 LPA (Including variables)
 



  





**Equal Opportunity Statement** 




 We are committed to diversity and inclusivity.

title: Linux Software Engineer - Ubuntu for Next-Gen Silicon (multiple roles and seniority levels)
description:
Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1200\\+ colleagues in 75\\+ countries and very few office\\-based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.
   

  

 The company is founder\\-led, profitable, and growing.
   

  

 Canonical's Partner Engineering Team is looking for open\\-source enthusiasts to work across the full Linux stack to ensure new silicon technologies, such as new hardware accelerators, AI stacks, confidential computing, networking, virtualization, and containerization stacks, are optimized for new silicons.
   

  

 Partner Engineering works closely with worldwide silicon companies to optimize Ubuntu for their new silicon, from x86, ARM, RISC\\-V, PowerPC and s390x architectures.
   

  

 Location: This is a Globally remote role
   

  

 The role entails
   

  

* Collaborating proactively within a distributed team
* Fostering a software ecosystem with seamless user experience for all Ubuntu users
* Evaluating contributions of other engineers to maintain high\\-quality software standards.
* Playing a role in shaping the future of Ubuntu via both \\- new ideas in your areas of interest and advising on work being done elsewhere
* Collaborating with other teams in the Ubuntu and Debian communities, with upstream projects, and commercially supported customers
* Debugging issues on open source code and team maintained code.
* Helping our our customers to integrate their apps, SDKs, build OS images, optimize applications with Ubuntu Core, Desktop and Server
* Working with a team to maintain Ubuntu, silicon features, and silicon\\-optimized packages across platforms and technologies such as:
+ Servers, HPC and AI systems, IoT devices, PCs, SmartNICs and automotive systems
+ AI stacks
+ Graphics, audio and multimedia stacks
+ Virtualisation and Containers
+ Hardware enablement stacks
+ New architectures, architecture variants and optimized toolchains
+ Package management and dependencies
+ Platform security (secure boot, FDE, Ubuntu Core, Confidential Computing)

* Work from home with global travel 2 to 4 weeks for internal events


 What we are looking for in you
   

  

* Exceptional academic track record from both high school and university
* Undergraduate degree in a technical subject or a compelling narrative about your alternative chosen path
* You love technology and working with brilliant people
* You are curious, flexible, articulate, and accountable
* You value soft skills and are passionate, enterprising, thoughtful, and self\\-motivated
* You value building partnerships with a diverse set of internal and external groups
* Strong fundamentals in C, C\\+\\+ and Python
* Experience or interest in learning Linux distribution packaging
* Experience or Interest in open source maintenance or contribution and licenses
* Fundamental understanding of package management and dependency resolution


**Additional Skills That You Might Also Bring**
* Experience with one or more of the following:
+ Graphics, audio, or multimedia stacks
+ Virtualization and containers (Docker, OCI, Kubernetes)
+ Hardware enablement for platforms and devices, including SmartNICs, NVMe storage, GPUs, audio components, and sensors
+ Performance optimization
+ Toolchain development and maintenance
+ Networking protocols and technologies (TCP/IP, DHCP, HTTP/REST)
+ Security best practices
+ IoT and embedded systems, including board\\-level hardware, SoCs, BMCs, bootloaders, firmware, operating systems, applications, and services


 What we offer colleagues
   

  

 We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognize outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance\\-driven annual bonus or commission. We provide all team members with additional benefits which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.
   

  

* Distributed work environment with twice\\-yearly team sprints in person
* Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
* Annual compensation review
* Recognition rewards
* Annual holiday leave
* Maternity and paternity leave
* Team Member Assistance Program \\& Wellness Platform
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues
* Priority Pass and travel upgrades for long\\-haul company events


**About Canonical**
 Canonical is a pioneering tech firm that is at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open source projects and the platform for AI, IoT and the cloud, we are changing the world on a daily basis. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence \\- in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Canonical has been a remote\\-first company since its inception in 2004\\. Working here is a step into the future, and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.
   

  

 Canonical is an equal opportunity employer
   

  

 We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

title: HMI Design Engineer(ADAS- Automotive)
description:
**Company Description** 




 Qubist Solutions LLC specializes in cutting\\-edge innovations in Avionics, Embedded Systems, AI/ML, Automotive, Medical, Railways, IoT, and Digital software. The company offers expertise in software architecture, design, development, and testing across the entire Software Development Life Cycle. With a strong background in aerospace and avionics, Qubist excels in software design, development, and verification/validation in compliance with industry standards such as RTCA/DO\\-178B, catering to a range of software safety levels.
 



  





  





**Job Description** 




 Position: HMI Design Engineer – ADAS (Parking Visualization) with
 
 5\\+ years Experience
 




  





**Role Description** 




 This is a full\\-time, on\\-site role located in Bangalore for an HMI Design Engineer specializing in Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) for Automotive technologies.
 



  






 HMI Design Engineer with
 
**5\\+ years Experience** 

 in Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) to develop and optimize parking visualization interfaces for automotive platforms. The candidate will work on high\\-performance graphical user interfaces for in\\-vehicle systems, focusing on real\\-time rendering, driver interaction, and visualization of parking assistance features.
 




  





 The primary responsibilities include designing and developing Human\\-Machine Interfaces (HMI) for automotive systems, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams, utilizing CAD tools for product design, and ensuring designs are functional and align with project specifications. The role also involves ensuring compliance with industry standards, performing necessary testing, and making design modifications as needed.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 Design and develop automotive HMI interfaces for ADAS parking visualization systems.
 



 Implement real\\-time graphics rendering using OpenGL.
 



 Develop UI components and application logic using Qt framework.
 



 Create intuitive driver visualization for parking features such as:
 



 Surround view / bird’s\\-eye view
 



 Parking guidelines
 



 Obstacle visualization
 



 Camera integration displays
 



 Optimize graphical performance for embedded automotive hardware platforms.
 



 Collaborate with ADAS perception, camera, and embedded software teams to integrate visualization features.
 



 Ensure compliance with automotive UI/UX safety and usability standards.
 



 Debug and optimize graphics pipeline performance for smooth real\\-time visualization.
 



 Support testing, validation, and deployment of HMI modules.
 



  





**Required Skills** 





 5\\+ years
 
 Strong experience in C\\\\ C\\+\\+ development.
 



 Hands\\-on experience with OpenGL / OpenGL ES for graphics rendering.
 



 Experience with Qt / Qt QML for UI development.
 



 Experience working on ADAS or automotive HMI systems.
 



 Understanding of camera\\-based visualization and parking assist systems.
 



 Knowledge of embedded Linux or automotive embedded platforms.
 



 Experience with real\\-time graphics performance optimization.
 



  





  





**Qualifications** 



* Strong knowledge of Design Engineering and Product Design methodologies
* Hands\\-on experience in Mechanical Engineering and Electrical Engineering principles
* Proficiency in Computer\\-Aided Design (CAD) tools and software
* Excellent problem\\-solving and analytical skills
* Bachelor’s degree or higher in an engineering discipline such as Mechanical or Electrical Engineering
* 5\\+ years Experience in automotive or similar industries, with a focus on ADAS systems, is an advantage
* Strong collaboration and communication skills to work effectively in a multidisciplinary team

title: MLOps Engineer
description:
Company Description
 



 CredFlow AI is advancing healthcare operations by automating credentialing, payer enrollment, and provider data management. Hospitals, payers, and providers currently burdened by manual workflows benefit from our agentic platform, which ensures continuous data accuracy and streamlines compliance processes. By auditing provider data in real\\-time and safeguarding network integrity, CredFlow AI enhances trust and reduces operational friction. Our mission is to empower healthcare teams to prioritize patient care rather than administrative paperwork.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 This is
 **not a traditional DevOps role** 
 .
 



 We are looking for an MLOps Engineer with strong hands\\-on experience in
 **PyTorch and GPU\\-based ML workloads** 
 , especially for large models (LLMs). You will design and build automated experimentation and optimization pipelines for large\\-scale ML systems, including deployments on AMD ROCm and NVIDIA GPU environments.
 



 You will work on performance optimization, distributed training/inference systems, and scalable ML infrastructure.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Build and maintain ML experimentation and optimization pipelines
* Implement hyperparameter search workflows (Optuna / similar)
* Adapt PyTorch\\-based training/inference workflows to AMD ROCm infrastructure
* Design and manage parallel job execution (50–100 configurations at scale)
* Collect benchmarking metrics and compute Pareto\\-optimal configurations
* Support and optimize LLM models such as Llama, Mistral, and Qwen



  





**Mandatory Requirements** 



* Hands\\-on experience with PyTorch
* Experience running ML workloads on GPUs (CUDA or ROCm)
* Experience with distributed training or large\\-scale inference
* Strong Python engineering skills
* Experience working with large models or transformer architectures



  





**Good to Have** 



* Experience with hyperparameter optimization (Optuna / Ax)
* Exposure to LLM serving frameworks (vLLM, DeepSpeed, Ray)
* Experience with AMD ROCm environments
* Experience with ML benchmarking and performance profiling
* Familiarity with Docker / Kubernetes

title: Senior Embedded Product Development Engineer
description:
**1\\.  Role Overview:** 




 We are looking for a highly experienced Senior Product Development Engineer with strong expertise in Embedded Hardware or Software Development, basic\\-to\\-moderate knowledge in Hardware or Software Design, and deep hands\\-on experience with Microcontrollers and Processors used in IoT and Industrial Automation.
 



 The candidate will lead development of advanced products such as wireless transmitters, battery\\-powered IoT devices and smart edge\\-processing devices.
 



 This is an end\\-to\\-end role across concept → architecture → processor \\+ hardware selection → firmware → testing → certification → production.
 



  





**2\\.  Processor / Microcontroller Skills:** 




 The candidate must have strong real\\-world experience with:
 



 ·      ARM Cortex–M Series
 



 ·      STM32L4 / L5 / F4 / F7 / G0 series
 



 ·      Low\\-power optimization on Cortex\\-M0/M3/M4/M33
 



 ·      Bootloader development, memory mapping, IRQ handling
 



 ·      ESP32 Family
 



 ·      WiFi \\+ BLE
 



 ·      IDF, FreeRTOS porting, OTA updates
 



 ·      Optimizing tasks and heap for mixed wireless \\+ sensor applications
 



 ·      Linux\\-Based Processors of STM/NXP/Ti or any other (Preferred)
 



 ·      Low\\-power design for battery\\-powered devices
 



 ·      Multi\\-threaded RTOS architecture
 



 ·      Interrupt\\-driven design
 



 ·      DMA\\-based data acquisition
 



 ·      High\\-speed ADC sampling and signal processing
 



 ·      Modbus/TCP for Linux processors
 



  





**3\\.  Key Responsibilities:** 




**A.  Product Architecture \\& Design** 




 ·    Select the right processor/microcontroller based on power, cost, memory, communications, and product roadmap.
 



 ·    Create firmware architectures for sensors, communications, storage, display, and power subsystems.
 



 ·    Evaluate LoRa/GSM/BLE module integration with processor pins, clocks, power rails, and interfaces.
 



 ·    Finalize hardware–firmware interaction architecture.
 



  





**B.  Firmware Development:** 




 ·    Develop firmware in C/C\\+\\+ on STM32, ESP32, and Linux processors.
 



 ·    Multi\\-tasking using FreeRTOS or other RTOS frameworks.
 



 ·    Drivers for ADC, DAC, SPI, I2C, UART, CAN, USB.
 



 ·    Sensor reading, filtering, calibration logic.
 



 ·    Power\\-optimized firmware for battery\\-operated IoT devices.
 



 ·    Bootloader, OTA, DFU implementation for all processor families.
 



 ·    Develop edge intelligence logic for advanced controllers.
 



  





**C.  Hardware Coordination:** 




 ·    Participate in schematic review, power tree validation, and PCB layout evaluation.
 



 ·    Validate processor\\-related power supply design (buck/boost, LDOs, decoupling).
 



 ·    Review EMI/EMC compliance and test findings for processor blocks.
 



 ·    Assist hardware team for debugging using SWD/JTAG, scope, LA.
 



  





**D. Testing, Field Execution \\& Certification:** 




 ·    Full hardware\\-software integration testing.
 



 ·    Environmental testing support (thermal chamber, vibration, IP).
 



 ·    EMI/EMC pre\\-compliance debugging.
 



 ·    Field testing for LoRa range, GSM connectivity, noise immunity.
 



  





**4\\.  Required Skills:** 




 ·      Core Technical Skills
 



 ·      Strong embedded C/C\\+\\+
 



 ·      STM32 \\+ ESP32 hands\\-on experience (5\\+ years combined)
 



 ·      RTOS (FreeRTOS mandatory), multi\\-tasking
 



 ·      ADC/DAQ architecture understanding
 



 ·      Communication protocols:
 



 ·      LoRa/LoRaWAN
 



 ·      BLE/WiFi
 



 ·      MQTT
 



 ·      CAN, RS485 (Modbus RTU/TCP)
 



 ·      Debugging tools: JTAG, SWD, logic analyzer
 



 ·      Hardware understanding: power tree, analog front\\-ends, PCB review
 



 ·      Additional Preferred Skills
 



 ·      Linux user\\-space driver development
 



 ·      Yocto/Buildroot
 



 ·      Python for testing/automation
 



 ·      Knowledge of explosion\\-proof / intrinsic safety design
 



 ·      DSP/Signal analysis for SRP Dynacard or vibration analysis
 



  





**5\\.  Educational Qualification:** 




 ·      B.E / B.Tech / M.Tech in Embedded Systems, Electronics, Electrical, Instrumentation or equivalent.
 



  





**6\\.  Experience:** 




 ·      6–12 years of embedded product development
 



 ·      Must have delivered minimum 3–5 commercial products from scratch
 



 ·      Experience leading junior team members
 



  





**7\\.  Personal Attributes:** 




 ·      Strong logical thinking \\& debugging mindset
 



 ·      Ownership of product lifecycle
 



 ·      Passion for innovation and R\\&D
 



 ·      Ability to work in fast\\-paced environment
 



 ·      Good documentation \\& communication skills
